ShortDescription.Value: Per-district private-car charging with live district stats, pre-ULEZ traffic baselines, and optional CustomChirps support.

LongDescription.Value:
ULEZ adds district-based road charging to Cities: Skylines II. Enable ULEZ per district, charge private cars inside active zones, and track traffic and revenue over time.
Features: • District-by-district ULEZ activation • Live district and citywide stats in the custom panel • Pre-ULEZ district baseline tracking • Daily summaries with traffic trends and revenue totals • Optional CustomChirps support
How to use: 1. Create and select a district. 2. Leave ULEZ off for a while if you want a pre-ULEZ traffic baseline. 3. Enable ULEZ in the custom ULEZ panel. 4. Let traffic run normally and review the panel stats.
Settings include Daily Charge, Charge Multiplier, Vehicle Scan Budget, and Debug Logging.
This release adds true pre-ULEZ baseline tracking, live panel stats, color-coded trend cues, richer daily reports, and save compatibility for older ULEZ installs.

ChangeLog.Value: 1.2.0 - Added pre-ULEZ district baseline tracking - Added live district and citywide panel stats - Added color-coded trend cues and richer daily reports - Updated player-facing documentation and Paradox listing text
